findings.detail: Imports from pipeline/ are TYPE_CHECKING only (investigation_types, fragility_scanner, regime_mapper, decision, kill_monitor). Runtime imports: integrity.input_guard, storage.gate_archiver, storage.archivist, storage.session. Does NOT import gate3_interaction or any shadow module.

Follows same patterns as gate1_interaction.py: GateArchiver + archivist for conversation logging, SessionManager + SessionState for checkpoint persistence, state machine (START → CONVICTION_FIRST → ANALYSE → CONFIRMING → END), KeyboardInterrupt handling with state save, turn limit enforcement.

Inputs: direction (str), hypotheses (list), fragility_report, regime_mapping, red_team_report, signal_conflicts, kill_criteria. Outputs: Gate2Session with conviction/outcome. Session checkpoint saved to SessionManager. Archive logged to GateArchiver. No data flows to shadows.
Single public function: async run_gate2(). Helper functions (_format_*, _parse_*) are module-private with underscore prefix.
Hard turn limit of 50 with warning at 40. Force-close at limit defaults to CONTINUE with conviction fallback. No infinite loop risk.
